**Rewritten Query (PII Removed):**  
I am dedicated, organized, and a leadership-oriented individual with 15+ years of experience in Medical Transcription and a strong understanding of medical terminology across various specialties. I have worked with physicians in fields such as Orthopedics, Cardiology, Gynecology, Psychiatry, Radiology, Internal Medicine, ENT, Family Medicine, Neurology, and Dermatology. I possess excellent interpersonal skills, am a team player, and am eager to learn and grow. I am reliable, dependable, and proactive in seeking new responsibilities across diverse employment areas. A multi-tasker who excels in supervising, transcription, and customer relationship management, I consistently exceed productivity to support organizational success.
